name: hb_3_23
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Gaocheng District (district_id 6) on 2025-07-10 compute and store the district-level PM2.5 profile: mean_pm25, max_pm25, mean_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), peak_pm25_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Investigate the root causes of elevated PM2.5 levels in Gaocheng District (district_id: 6) on 2025-07-10, considering local emission sources, meteorological conditions, and regional transport
